CustomField.description: Created this new field as part of BR-5907 to store the Case Owners
CustomField.formula: IF( AND( NOT(ISBLANK( Last_synchronization_date__c)), NOT(CONTAINS( $Label.Integration_User_ID , Owner:User.Id)) , Owner:User.IsActive, LEFT(Owner:User.Id, 3) = '005') , Owner:User.Email ,'')
CustomField.label: Case Owner Email
